title: feat: add test for nested stream and check value has predict_id
body:
This PR is to add test for nested streaming where we have an agent streaming its response and its tools to run some dspy programs.

- I added the test to validate the use case
- I add check the predict_id before attempt to response to client

Related issue: https://github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy/issues/8454

cc @chenmoneygithub, @okhat

step_plan.summary: Adds a regression test for nested streaming (outer agent streaming while a tool runs a streaming DSPy Predict) and hardens stream routing to safely handle LiteLLM stream chunks that are missing `predict_id` or have an unrecognized `predict_id`, preventing crashes in nested contexts.

steps.operation: Harden ModelResponseStream routing in nested streaming by validating predict_id before listener lookup
steps.reason: Nested streaming can yield LiteLLM ModelResponseStream chunks without a predict_id (or with an unknown one). The current logic assumes `value.predict_id` exists and is present in `predict_id_to_listener`, which can raise (e.g., AttributeError/KeyError) and break outer streaming. Add a defensive gate: only route to a listener when `hasattr(value, 'predict_id')` and `value.predict_id in predict_id_to_listener`; otherwise ignore (or safely fall back) so nested streams do not crash.
steps.side_effects: Changes behavior for malformed/unexpected stream chunks: they will no longer crash routing and may be dropped or bypass listener routing depending on the chosen fallback. Ensure existing listener-based streaming tests still pass and that non-listener streaming (direct yielding) is not impacted.

steps.operation: Add a regression test that reproduces nested streaming (agent stream + tool invokes streaming Predict) and asserts no crash under missing/unknown predict_id conditions
steps.reason: Create a failing-on-main, passing-after-fix test that exercises the reported scenario: an outer streaming program calls a tool that runs a DSPy Predict which also streams. The test should validate that streaming completes without exceptions and that the system tolerates chunks lacking predict_id or having a predict_id not registered in the current stream listener map (per issue #8454).
steps.side_effects: May require constructing a minimal mock/stub LM stream generator (or monkeypatching) to emit ModelResponseStream-like objects with/without `predict_id`, and may increase test runtime/flakiness if it depends on real networked LMs. Prefer deterministic mocks to keep CI stable.
